raw_consumer_statement: Back in XXXX I made purchases with XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX  There were a few direct purchases from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX and there was a Pay in 4 using XXXX for around {$40.00} per payment. The entire total was around {$420.00}. I called CITI bank to dispute after i came to the conclusion a year after purchasing that XXXX was never going to fulfill my order. I send in all the proper documents highlighting the transactions, listing the total and which transactions I was disputing. With a handwritten letter as to what happened and why I was disputing. in XXXX. I never got an answer from citi bank. I tried several times throughout XXXX. They have log of me and my inquiry from XXXX and reference the same thing every time I call. They have all my recorded calls, and they make the same notes every time. I'm tired of repeating myself with no resolution. Its XXXX, I've been paying interest on these charges for 4 years! They never send me any of the paperwork they say there going to and they never tell me what i need to do. I can't go back in time to get the reports anymore because they only have them for 24 months, at most.
